title: codereview-pass2: missing update to Rust pseudocode and test vector cross-refs in SFN section
description: After fixing C example for project-LICHEN-ttam, the Rust fn calculate_sfn_delta should explicitly mention .wrapping_sub for boundary clarity. Also, update 'See test/vectors/sfn-delta.json' to reference specific boundary test case name if present in JSON. The new text should mention cross-impl test requirement more prominently per triple-impl discipline. Filed as codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-ttam.
